formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
[
  {
    "name": "Fick's Law of Diffusion",
    "formula": "Rate of diffusion = -D \* dC/dx",
    "variables": "Rate of diffusion (F), diffusion coefficient (D), concentration gradient (dC/dx)",
    "units": "Rate of diffusion: mol/m2s, diffusion coefficient: m2/s, concentration gradient: mol/m3",
    "notes": "Describes the rate of diffusion of particles from a region of high concentration to a region of low concentration."
  },
  {
    "name": "Hooke's Law",
    "formula": "F = kx",
    "variables": "Force (F), spring constant (k), displacement (x)",
    "units": "Force: N, spring constant: N/m, displacement: m",
    "notes": "Describes the relationship between the force applied to a spring and its resulting displacement."
  },
  {
    "name": "Newton's Second Law of Motion",
    "formula": "F = ma",
    "variables": "Force (F), mass (m), acceleration (a)",
    "units": "Force: N, mass: kg, acceleration: m/s2",
    "notes": "Describes the relationship between the force applied to an object and its resulting acceleration."
  },
  {
    "name": "Viscous Drag Formula",
    "formula": "F = 6πηrv",
    "variables": "Force (F), coefficient of viscosity (η), radius (r), velocity (v)",
    "units": "Force: N, coefficient of viscosity: Pa.s, radius: m, velocity: m/s",
    "notes": "Describes the force of viscous drag acting on an object moving through a fluid."
  },
  {
    "name": "Bernoulli's Principle",
    "formula": "P + 1/2ρv2 + ρgy = constant",
    "variables": "Pressure (P), density (ρ), velocity (v), height (y)",
    "units": "Pressure: Pa, density: kg/m3, velocity: m/s, height: m",
    "notes": "Describes the relationship between pressure and velocity of a fluid in motion."
  },
  {
    "name": "Gibbs-Von Laue Diffraction Equation",
    "formula": "2d sin(θ) = nλ",
    "variables": "Interplanar distance (d), angle of diffraction (θ), wavelength (λ), order of diffraction (n)",
    "units": "Interplanar distance: m, angle of diffraction: rad, wavelength: m, order of diffraction: dimensionless",
    "notes": "Describes the relationship between the interplanar distance, angle of diffraction, wavelength, and order of diffraction in X-ray diffraction."
  }
]
